title: Rules applicable
doc_html:
CHAPTER 4.  PARTIES TO INCIDENTAL DEMANDS

Art. 771.  Rules applicable

Articles 641 through 742 and 801 through 821 are applicable to the parties to an incidental demand.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 4.  PARTIES TO INCIDENTAL DEMANDS
Art. 771.  Rules applicable
Articles 641 through 742 and 801 through 821 are applicable to the parties to an incidental demand.
